title: Week 3 Day 1 Mentor Guide
mentorRole: Support rookies in translating customer insights into viable business model components
beforeSession: Review each mentee's Week 2 Customer Discovery Canvas
Note gaps between customer problems and proposed solutions
Prepare to challenge revenue assumptions with market data
duringSession: Observe squad peer review, note who gives/receives feedback well
Ask probing questions during canvas work: 'How will you price this?' 'Who else needs to succeed for you to succeed?'
Flag rookies struggling with financial realism for 1-on-1 follow-up
after Session: Provide async feedback on mentor dashboard
Flag rookies at risk of weak Stage Gate 1 performance
coachingQuestions: How does your revenue model align with your customer's ability and willingness to pay?
What resources do you already have? What do you need to acquire?
Who are potential partners? What value do you offer them?
What makes your UVP unique compared to other advisors serving similar clients?
Are your costs realistic for a starting practice?
redFlags: Revenue model is vague ('I'll charge fees')
No mention of costs or expenses
UVP is generic ('I provide excellent service')
week3MentorOutcomes: Each rookie should have a coherent business model that connects customer needs to value delivery and financial sustainability.
